name: Spider
description: JavaScript-aware Katana spider for deeper client-side route discovery.
long_description: Runs Katana with JavaScript crawling enabled and a configurable depth. Use this for applications where client-side links and JavaScript-rendered routes may expose additional paths.

fields.label: Target URL
fields.help: Enter the full website URL to scan, including the http:// or https:// protocol.

validation.message: Must be a valid HTTP(S) URL

fields.label: Depth
fields.help: Range of crawl depth: 1-10. Higher values scan deeper but take longer. Default: 3. Recommended: 1-5.

safety.consent_message: Spidering with JS support is active reconnaissance.
